message:
fix(cli,server): busy-lock fallback for robot attachments, project slug resolution, self-update hardening, mail send timeout

Robot attachments DB open (cli):
- When canonical DB open fails with SQLITE_BUSY / resource-busy, fall
  back to best-effort read-only open instead of propagating the error.
  This prevents robot attachment reads from hanging when another
  connection holds a reserved lock on the database.
- Add comprehensive test that holds a RESERVED lock in a background
  thread and verifies the fallback path returns readable rows within
  the timeout window.

Project slug resolution (cli):
- Introduce `resolve_project_slug_for_cli()` which mirrors the MCP
  tool layer's dual-lookup: direct slug match -> human_key match (for
  absolute paths) -> slugified path match.
- Wire it into all 7 file-reservation subcommands (List, Active, Soon,
  Acquire, Extend, Release, Conflicts) so users can pass either a slug
  or a project directory path from the CLI.

Self-update checksum verification (cli):
- Switch from per-artifact `.sha256` sidecar files to a consolidated
  `SHA256SUMS` manifest per release, parsing the multi-line format to
  locate the matching artifact hash.
- After a successful self-update, invalidate the update-check cache
  file so that doctor / --version don't report a stale "update
  available" hint.

Mail send timeout (cli):
- Wrap `call_send_message_tool_locally` in a 30-second
  `asupersync::time::timeout` so the CLI doesn't hang indefinitely
  when the server is unresponsive.

Config env var rename (cli):
- Rename AGENT_MAIL_HTTP_PORT -> HTTP_PORT in the `config set-port`
  handler (4 occurrences) for consistency with the shortened env var
  naming convention.

Startup integrity checks (server):
- Clarify doc comment on `startup_integrity_check_missing_file` test:
  a missing DB is treated as integrity corruption to trigger
  recovery/initialization, not silently accepted.
- Add `readiness_check_recovers_missing_sqlite_before_startup_integrity_check`
  test confirming auto-initialization before the integrity probe.
- Add `integrity_probe_missing_db_without_archive_is_ok_for_fresh_startup`
  test verifying fresh startups with a missing DB don't surface false
  IntegrityCorruption errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
